title: delta_force
description: It's a weirdly styled Delta Force style mod
body:
It's a weirdly styled Delta Force style mod

The mod adds some collectibles from Delta Force for players to make materials

Players can use these Delta Force collectibles to craft sophisticated gear and weapons, such as: A top-of-the-line luxury sword
![tool](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52791f701ffa1893dc773f5ef845efb20cc79e6a.png)

At the moment this mod is not perfect. The tools for mods are expensive, but they are powerful
![all](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5aa75f470dce5bbbdc528cfcb5b26a833602b9c0_0.webp)
